parents.subject: LU-16540 clio: Don't count owned DIO pages

commit.subject: LU-16540 llite: Remove env from cl2*_io
commit.message:
LU-16540 llite: Remove env from cl2*_io

The upcoming DIO parallelism patch breaks the assumption
that the IO is always from the env, so remove those
asserts and the env passing which enables them.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9c2719423c9fc6330ee6fd3ee9a7ed937b239cf4
